intent: b3 — Brontes admits the seized valve and sends the player to the midway.

glare.text: The wheel's feed valve seized overnight. Bronze fatigue. I can't leave my boiler and Tullo here is being GRADED on it.

ask.text: Naso on the midway keeps salvage from last year's coursework. A bronze valve, three-quarter bore. Quietly.

grunt.text: Hm. Maybe the fair produces one useful thing a year after all.
